event: Miracle of Saint Ignatius of Loyola (Exorcism)
symbols: raised arms of Ignatius — priestly authority invoking divine power over evil
contorted figures on the ground — the torment of demonic possession
angels above — heavenly assistance in spiritual warfare
ornate church interior — the sacred space where spiritual authority is exercised
description: A large dramatic composition set inside an ornate church interior with columns and arches. A central figure in elaborate golden priestly vestments stands elevated with arms raised in a commanding gesture. Below and around him, numerous figures writhe, collapse, and contort on the ground in various states of distress and torment. Small angelic figures and cherubs appear in the upper portion amid clouds. Onlookers and attendants surround the scene. The composition is dynamic and theatrical, with strong diagonal movement.

_meta.title: Miracle of St. Ignatius of Loyola
